---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Nemolizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Nemolizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Nemolizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Atopic dermatitis (AD)&nbsp;Nemluvio is indicated for the treatment of moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis in patients aged 12 years and older who are candidates for systemic therapy. Prurigo...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（98.5%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（98.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（98.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（98.0%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（97.7%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（97.7%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（97.6%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（97.3%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（95.2%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（94.8%）</li>
<li>gastric adenocarcinoma and proximal polyposis of the stomach（94.8%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（94.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/nemolizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
